creator: jdc@koitsu.org
text:
Created attachment 188189
Patch / svn diff against r454662

In light of r325781, r325828, and r325829, I have made a port that provides all the classic FreeBSD fortunes (circa r325780) for those who want them.

Please note that LICENSE is unset intentionally.  See Makefile comment for details about that.

The rest of the details are on GitHub: https://github.com/koitsu/fortune-mod-freebsd-classic
